reason: Dead import maps #agentic-embed and #agentic-voice in package.json 'imports' field — no source file references them (confirmed via grep). These are leftover from an earlier adapter pattern that was replaced by direct package imports. They point to stubs/adapters that are not used in the actual code path.
proposedChange:
Remove the 'imports' field from package.json entirely:

Delete:
  "imports": {
    "#agentic-embed": "./src/runtime/adapters/embed.js",
    "#agentic-voice": "./src/runtime/adapters/voice/openai-tts.js"
  }

The actual code uses direct imports: 'agentic-embed' (in runtime/embed.js) and 'agentic-voice' (in runtime/stt.js, tts.js) via the dependencies field.
resolution: Already covered by task-1775840057892 (Remove dead import maps from package.json) which is in review. #agentic-voice was removed in commit e699e630; #agentic-embed remains and will be removed when that task completes.
